page.title: Chat conversations
page.description: Review session conversations, manage sending locks, and audit therapy chat activity.
page.detailDescription: Read the transcript, review attachments, and manage moderation for this conversation.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient, practitioner, session code, or conversation id

empty.title: No conversations found
empty.description: Try widening your filters or searching a different session code.

errors.title: Could not load conversations
errors.loadFailed: We could not load chat conversations right now.

detail.title: Could not load conversation details
detail.description: We could not load this conversation right now.

messages.title: Could not load messages
messages.description: We could not load the transcript right now.

detail.title: Conversation details
detail.description: Read the complete session transcript and review attachments safely.

moderation.title: Sending lock
moderation.description: Track who closed or reopened sending for this conversation.
moderation.practitionerLockNote: The practitioner lock remains active until the practitioner reopens it.

empty.title: No messages yet
empty.description: This conversation has not received any messages yet.

history.title: Conversation history
history.description: Metadata and preview classification for this conversation.

attachment.heading: Attachments
attachment.restricted: Attachment available to authorized admins only
attachment.restrictedHint: This file can only be viewed by authorized admins.

disable.title: Disable sending
disable.description: Stop new messages in this conversation without deleting its history.
disable.warning: This action keeps all previous messages and files readable.
disable.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why sending should be disabled

enable.title: Enable sending
enable.description: Restore sending if the conversation policy allows it.
enable.practitionerLockNote: Re-enabling admin lock does not remove a practitioner lock.
